subcodes.first_line: Bear thou witness, O servant, unto that which God did testify before the creation of the heavens and of the earth and ere He created the angels [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاشهد یا عبد بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارض و قبل ان یخلق ملئکه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
